task_completion.description: Create a rectangular room outline with a suspended ceiling grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangular room boundary is drawn on the canvas, filled with a grid pattern representing a suspended ceiling.

task_completion.description: Add a dimension line indicating the 24' length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension line running parallel to one of the longer walls of the room, explicitly showing the number '24' or '24''.

task_completion.description: Place 6 Panel Lights in a 2x3 grid and 2 HVAC Supply Diffusers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Six rectangular or square light fixtures (troffers) arranged in a 2x3 or 3x2 pattern, plus two HVAC diffuser symbols (typically squares with an 'X' or directional arrows inside).

task_completion.description: Place a central Projector, a Motorized Screen on the 16' front wall, and 2 ceiling Speakers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A projector symbol located near the center of the room, a screen symbol placed along one of the shorter (16') walls, and two speaker symbols placed within the ceiling area.

task_completion.description: Place a WiFi Access Point and an Occupancy Sensor with specific text labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Symbols representing a WAP and an occupancy sensor, accompanied by the exact text labels 'WAP-01' and 'OCC-01' visible on or adjacent to the respective shapes.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an .eddx file and export it as a .png file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application tab or title bar shows 'conference_room_rcp.eddx', and there is a save/export dialog or file manager window confirming the creation of 'conference_room_rcp.png' in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax application open with tools, menus, and the canvas being actively used, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The diagram was built progressively rather than opening a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show the diagram in partial states of completion (e.g., just the room outline, then adding shapes one by one).

integrity.description: The expected files were genuinely saved and exported from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save and export dialogs in EdrawMax are used to generate the .eddx and .png files, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' to create empty dummy files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output files: /home/ga/Documents/conference_room_rcp.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/conference_room_rcp.png. Required text labels in the diagram: 'WAP-01' and 'OCC-01'. Required shapes to be present: Projector, Screen, Light (6x), Diffuser (2x), Speaker (2x).
